title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF PONSOD, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARIBOJOC, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO PONSOD.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3729 / 52 OG No. 9, 4190 (August 16, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1513, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF PONSOD, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARIBOJOC, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO PONSOD.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Ponsod, in the Municipality of Maribojoc, Province of Bohol, is hereby converted to a barrio to be known as Barrio Ponsod.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1956.
